subject: docs(claude): adopt glow-props Triggers section (cross-fleet policy 2026-04-17)
body:
Replaces the old 10-trigger single-word list with glow-props' 48-trigger,
8-group structure plus meta sweeps, reflective passes, and scope modifiers.
Adds an AI Notes entry clarifying precedence when trigger names collide with
the repo's `docs/` and `types/` folders (bare word = trigger; with a slash
or path context = path).

Tags: docs, claude-md, triggers, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: adopt glow-props Triggers section (cross-fleet policy 2026-04-17)
